data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Google employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Use of discrete services for different functionalities, communicating via APIs.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures high availability and reliability of services.
data.technical_spec: Google's global load balancing distributes traffic across multiple regions.

data.title: Serverless Computing
data.description: Run applications in a cloud environment without managing server infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of Google Cloud Functions for event-driven processes.

data.title: Kubernetes for Container Orchestration
data.description: Uses Kubernetes to manage containerized applications automatically.
data.technical_spec: Provision of deployment and scaling of application containers.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: Manages data with cloud-based databases for efficiency and performance.
data.technical_spec: Uses Google Cloud Spanner and BigQuery for data storage and analytics.
